description: CHINESE SLIPPING IN FROM MEXICO Smuggling Traffic Develops on Border Especially in Southern California 700 A HEAD IS CHARGED Chicagoan in San Francisco Said to Be Financing Illegal Immigration Bpecial iMspatch to Tub Nbw Yobk HbbaldSan Francisco Feb 12Interesting facts recently have come to light in connection with activities of United States Immigration offices on the Mexican border The service there is strenuous Business does not come to the inspectors It Is part of their every day duty to go out end get the business This is far from an easy task At Ellis Island and other Atlantic ports immigration officers merely watch people who necessarily come to them In the southern part of California along the great stretch of Mexican border these men must be constantly on the alert There are smugglers by the score who operate between the Mexican republic find Various California cities Of the cities favored by the gentry San Fran eiseo probably 1b foremost although Los Angeles San Diego Riverside Bakersfield Fresno and other communities come In for a share Many Chinese Smufetsietl In It Is a fact well within the knowledge of the authorities that many Chinese aro smuggled from Mexico into this country
